name: Socfinaf S.A.
summary: Socfinaf S.A. produces, processes, and sells palm oil and rubber products. It has 139,600 hectares of tropical palm and rubber plantations located in Africa. The company was formerly known as Intercultures and changed its name to Socfinaf S.A. in January 2011. Socfinaf S.A. was founded in 1890 and is based in Luxembourg City, Luxembourg.
